scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:railway: npm run build -w shared && npm run db:generate -w server && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate -w server && npm run db:migrate -w server && npm run db:seed -w server
